steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks how the narrator characterizes the Seine. Find the passage's contrast: the river is blocked and turbulent inside Paris, then spreads out and becomes peaceful in the countryside.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — clearer in Paris than in the countryside: Wrong. Water clarity is never mentioned. ✗
  • Choice B — more peaceful in Paris than in the countryside: Wrong. This reverses what the passage says. ✗
  • Choice C — more confined and rough in Paris than in the countryside: Correct. "Confined" fits the viaduct blocking the river; "rough" fits the contrast with the peaceful countryside river. ✓
  • Choice D — more impressive in Paris than in the countryside: Wrong. The narrator's language favors the countryside. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
